'''''Episode I Adventures 11: Pirates from Beyond the Sea''''' was the eleventh installment of ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''.

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''Space pirates have attacked the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungans' sacred place]], hijacking ancient statues and threatening to sell them to the highest bidder. They have also taken Rep [[Teers/Legends|Teers]] hostage. Only a small band of Gungans can save Teers and the treasures.''

''The pirates have invaded—and time is running out.''
